title: Invitation for Pre-Qualification - Lease of Land for Investment at UDSM Mlimani Campus
description: The University of Dar es Salaam intends to pre-qualify potential investor and/or firm for Lease of Land for Investment at the University of Dar es Salaam, Mwl. J.K. Nyerere Mlimani Campus. Pre-qualification conducted through Public Procurement Act, Cap 410. Applications via NeST only.

contact.address: University of Dar es Salaam, Mwl. J.K. Nyerere Mlimani Campus
